content:
If you could redesign one aspect of this course to better support your learning, what would it be and why?


Week 2: Narrative Writing

Day 5: The Power of Storytelling
📌 Instructions: Choose one of the prompts below to explore in depth.

🔹 Concrete Prompt:

Think of a moment when you had to tell a personal story to someone. How did you decide what details to include or leave out?

🔹 Abstract Prompt:

Why do people tell stories? How do narratives help shape identity and memory?

🔹 Connecting Prompt:

Compare storytelling in spoken vs. written form. How does each medium change the way a story is received?

🔹 Exploratory Prompt:

If you could tell only one story about your life to future generations, which would it be and why?


Day 6: Painting with Words
📌 Instructions: Choose one of the prompts below to explore in depth.
